name: Spinach Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Defrost the spinach and remove excess moisture by squeezing it out.
2. Chop the green onions finely.
3. Add the defrosted and drained spinach to a bowl.
4. Incorporate the mayonnaise, water chestnuts, sour cream, and vegetable soup mix into the spinach.
5. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
6. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for several hours to allow flavors to develop.
7. Serve the dip with raw vegetables or in a bread bowl made from a hollowed-out loaf of round bread (such as rye or Cuban bread). Cube the leftover bread pieces and serve with the dip.
